section.para: This extensions allows to specify some attributes for FM APRS settings specific to radios running the OpenGD77 firmware.

example.programlisting: positioning: - aprs: name: APRS # ... opengd77: transmitQSY: false baud: 1200

section.para: The OpenGD77 extension is a mapping named opengd77. It contains the device specific settings for that APRS system.
For now, there are only two attributes affecting the behavior of the APRS system.

listitem.para: If enabled, OpenGD77 will append the current frequency to the APRS message.
Sets the baud rate for the ARPS transmission. This can either be 1200 or 300. The former is the default and used on VHF. The latter is used on HF.
